data.name: Label.KeepOneEmptyRow
data.value: At least one empty row must be kept

data.name: Message.ConfirmApproveAction
data.value: Are you sure you want to approve this document?

data.name: Message.ConfirmBatchApproveAction
data.value: Are you sure you want to approve the selected {0} {1}?

data.name: Modal.UnsavedChanges
data.value: This record has unsaved changes, please choose an action

data.name: Module.DisabledMessage
data.value: This module is not enabled in your system. Please contact your system administrator.

data.name: Message.DeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete?

data.name: Preference.ExportSettingsTooltip
data.value: Export preferences to a JSON file

data.name: Preference.ImportSettingsTooltip
data.value: Import preferences from a JSON file

data.name: Preference.ImportSuccess
data.value: Settings imported. Click Save to apply.

data.name: Preference.LanguageHelpText
data.value: Page will reload after saving to apply new language

data.name: Preference.UnsavedChangesWarningDesc
data.value: When disabled, closing a form with unsaved changes will not prompt for confirmation. Make sure you are in the habit of saving manually before leaving.

data.name: Employee.AccountHelpText
data.value: Account is set by administrator and cannot be changed

data.name: Password.LeaveBlank
data.value: Leave blank to keep current password

data.name: Error.PasswordMismatch
data.value: Passwords do not match, please confirm again

data.name: Page.CrmLeadSubtitle
data.value: Manage lead development pipeline and follow-up records

data.name: Message.ConvertToCustomerConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to convert this lead to a formal customer? A customer record will be created automatically.

data.name: Message.AlreadyConverted
data.value: This lead has already been converted to a customer

data.name: Modal.ConfirmDeleteFollowUpRecord
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this follow-up record? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Report.CrmLeadReportDesc
data.value: Print CRM lead development report with stage, source, assigned salesperson and estimated value

data.name: Placeholder.NewPassword
data.value: Leave blank to keep current password

data.name: Report.NotAvailable
data.value: This report is not yet available

data.name: Report.InstructionText
data.value: Click "Open" or click the row to open report filter settings

data.name: Report.MaterialScrapRecordDesc
data.value: Query production components with scrap or return quantities, grouped by production item

data.name: Report.MaterialRequirementsDesc
data.value: Aggregate material requirements for scheduled production items by component, showing required, issued and pending quantities

data.name: Message.NoRoleAssigned
data.value: No role has been assigned to this employee. Permissions cannot be displayed.

data.name: Hint.OnePrimaryPerCustomer
data.value: Only one primary account allowed per customer

data.name: Hint.OnePrimaryPerSupplier
data.value: Only one primary account allowed per supplier

data.name: Hint.OnePrimaryPerCompany
data.value: Only one primary account allowed per company

data.name: Hint.OnePrimaryPerEmployee
data.value: Only one primary account allowed per employee

data.name: Payroll.IsProratedHelpText
data.value: When checked, this allowance will be calculated proportionally based on the employee's monthly attendance ratio

data.name: Page.PayrollItemsSubtitle
data.value: Manage income and deduction items for payroll calculation

data.name: Page.EmployeeSalarySubtitle
data.value: Manage base salary, allowances and insurance settings

data.name: Page.EmployeeBankAccountSubtitle
data.value: Manage employee bank accounts for payroll transfer

data.name: Page.PayrollPeriodSubtitle
data.value: Manage monthly payroll period opening and closing

data.name: Payroll.OpenPeriodHint
data.value: After opening, payroll can be calculated. Once closed, no further changes are allowed.

data.name: Page.PayrollSubtitle
data.value: Calculate and confirm employee payslips by pay period

data.name: Payroll.NoAllowances
data.value: No allowances configured. Click Add to set one.

data.name: Payroll.AllowanceHint
data.value: Only Allowance-type items can be set here. Meal allowance up to 3,000/mo is tax-free; transport allowance up to 3,000/mo is tax-free.

data.name: Page.PayrollSettingsSubtitle
data.value: Manage insurance rates, labor/health insurance grade tables, and withholding tax tables

data.name: Page.InsuranceRateSubtitle
data.value: Maintain labor, health insurance and retirement rates

data.name: Page.LaborInsuranceGradeSubtitle
data.value: Maintain labor insurance insured salary grade table

data.name: Page.HealthInsuranceGradeSubtitle
data.value: Maintain national health insurance insured amount grade table

data.name: Page.WithholdingTaxTableSubtitle
data.value: Maintain salary income withholding tax table

data.name: Payroll.SyncAlreadyUpToDate
data.value: Data is already up to date

data.name: Payroll.MinimumWageNote
data.value: Source: Ministry of Labor open data, updated annually. If the latest year is not yet available, add it manually.

data.name: Payroll.ClickSyncHint
data.value: Click "Load from Government" to import historical minimum wage data

data.name: Payroll.MonthlyOrHourlyRequired
data.value: Monthly or hourly wage must be filled in

data.name: Payroll.OvertimeRatesWarning
data.value: The following multipliers are governed by the Labor Standards Act. Lowering them may violate the law. Adjust only if a legal amendment has taken effect.

data.name: Payroll.NationalHolidayRateNote
data.value: Monthly salary already includes the holiday day; this is the extra pay multiplier

data.name: Page.AttendanceSummarySubtitle
data.value: Manage monthly attendance days and overtime hours for payroll calculation

data.name: Attendance.LockedMessage
data.value: This attendance record is locked (payroll calculated), read-only

data.name: Attendance.SickLeaveNote
data.value: Sick leave deducted at half-day rate

data.name: Attendance.ClearAllHint
data.value: Clear all daily records for this employee this month

data.name: Attendance.SaveAndRebuildSuccess
data.value: Daily records saved and monthly summary rebuilt

data.name: Attendance.TotalWorkHoursHint
data.value: Total work hours for hourly employees (auto-rebuilt from daily detail)

data.name: CompanyLogo.SaveFirst
data.value: Please save company data before uploading a logo

data.name: CompanyLogo.DeleteMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this logo? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: CompanyLogo.Hint
data.value: Supports JPG, PNG, GIF, SVG formats, max 500KB

data.name: BusinessCard.SaveFirst
data.value: Please save first before uploading business card photos

data.name: BusinessCard.NoPhotos
data.value: No business card photos uploaded yet

data.name: BusinessCard.DeleteMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this business card photo? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: EmployeePhoto.SaveFirst
data.value: Please save employee data before uploading a photo

data.name: EmployeePhoto.DeleteMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this photo? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ItemPhoto.SaveFirst
data.value: Please save product data before uploading photos

data.name: ItemPhoto.DeleteMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this photo? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: QuotationPhoto.SaveFirst
data.value: Please save the quotation before uploading photos

data.name: QuotationPhoto.DeleteMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this photo? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: SalesOrderPhoto.SaveFirst
data.value: Please save the order before uploading photos

data.name: SalesOrderPhoto.DeleteMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this photo? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Supplier.CopyToCustomerMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to copy this supplier's data as a new customer?

data.name: Supplier.CopyToCustomerSummary
data.value: A new record will be created in the customer list after copying.

data.name: Customer.CopyToSupplierMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to copy this customer's data as a new supplier?

data.name: Customer.CopyToSupplierSummary
data.value: A new record will be created in the supplier list after copying.

data.name: CsvImport.FormatDesc
data.value: Columns: Transaction Date, Description, Debit, Credit, Bank Reference (optional), Balance After (optional). Date format: yyyy/MM/dd or yyyy-MM-dd.

data.name: CsvImport.HasInvalidWarning
data.value: Some rows have errors (shown in red). Only valid rows will be imported.

data.name: Customer.AutoSyncNote
data.value: Item list is auto-synced from sales orders, delete only

data.name: Customer.NoItems
data.value: No customer products found for this customer

data.name: Customer.ConfirmRemoveItem
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove "{0}" from this customer?

data.name: Accounting.SaveFirst
data.value: Please save the data first before viewing accounting sub-accounts.

data.name: Accounting.CreateSubAccountTitle
data.value: Create all missing sub-accounts for this record

data.name: Accounting.CreateError
data.value: An error occurred while creating sub-accounts

data.name: Report.FilterConfigNotFound
data.value: Filter configuration not found for report ID "{0}"

data.name: Report.FilterTemplateNotConfigured
data.value: No filter template configured for this report

data.name: Report.NoCriteriaHint
data.value: If no conditions are selected, all records will be included. It is recommended to set filter conditions before querying to avoid loading too much data.

data.name: Report.NoFilterConfirmMessage
data.value: No filter conditions are set. All records will be loaded. Are you sure you want to continue?

data.name: Message.OpenEditWindowFirst
data.value: Please open the edit window first

data.name: Report.AccountsReceivableDesc
data.value: Filter accounts receivable by period and customer, showing delivery amount, collected amount, and outstanding balance. Options to include settled receivables or show only overdue items.

data.name: Report.CustomerStatementDesc
data.value: Generate customer statement for a specified period, including delivery, return, and payment details with opening/closing balances

data.name: Report.CustomerSalesAnalysisDesc
data.value: Ranked by sales amount, analyzes customer sales share and ranking

data.name: Report.CustomerTransactionDesc
data.value: Query customer delivery and return transaction records grouped by customer

data.name: Report.CustomerRosterDesc
data.value: Print customer basic data list including customer code, company name, contact person, tax ID, phone, and address

data.name: Report.CustomerDetailDesc
data.value: Print complete customer details including contact info, payment terms, and sales rep, one block per customer

data.name: Report.CustomerVisitReportDesc
data.value: Print customer visit records including visit date, customer, visitor, purpose, and result summary

data.name: Report.CustomerComplaintReportDesc
data.value: Print customer complaint records including complaint date, customer, category, status, responsible person, and resolved date

data.name: Report.SupplierStatementDesc
data.value: Generate supplier statement for a specified period, including purchase, return, and payment details with opening/closing balances

data.name: Report.SupplierPurchaseAnalysisDesc
data.value: Analyze supplier purchase amounts and trends

data.name: Report.SupplierRosterDesc
data.value: Print supplier basic data list including supplier code, name, contact, tax ID, phone, and address

data.name: Report.SupplierDetailDesc
data.value: Print complete supplier details including contact info, payment terms, and address, one block per supplier

data.name: Report.PurchaseOrderDesc
data.value: Print purchase order including supplier info, product details, and amount summary

data.name: Report.PurchaseReceivingDesc
data.value: Print receiving document including inspection info and warehouse entry details

data.name: Report.PurchaseReturnDesc
data.value: Print purchase return document including return reason and return details

data.name: Report.QuotationDesc
data.value: Print quotation including customer info, product details, and amount summary

data.name: Report.SalesOrderDesc
data.value: Print sales order including customer info, product details, and amount summary

data.name: Report.SalesDeliveryDesc
data.value: Print delivery note including customer info, product details, and amount summary

data.name: Report.SalesReturnDesc
data.value: Print sales return document including return reason and return details

data.name: Report.ItemListDesc
data.value: Print product basic data list including product code, name, specification, barcode, category, and unit

data.name: Report.ItemDetailDesc
data.value: Print complete product details including specification, barcode, category, unit, purchase type, cost, and pricing, one block per product

data.name: Report.BOMReportDesc
data.value: Print product BOM list showing component code, name, quantity, unit, and cost grouped by formula

data.name: Report.ProductionScheduleDesc
data.value: Query production schedules including schedule items, quantity, status, and planned dates

data.name: Report.InventoryStatusDesc
data.value: Query current stock status for each warehouse including available stock, reserved stock, and inventory value

data.name: Report.InventoryTransactionDesc
data.value: Query inventory movement and transaction records

data.name: Report.InventoryCountDesc
data.value: Grouped by stocktake, shows system stock, actual count, and variance amount per product; supports filtering by variance items only

data.name: Report.VehicleListDesc
data.value: Print vehicle basic data list including plate number, vehicle name, model, brand, person in charge, and insurance expiry

data.name: Report.VehicleMaintenanceDesc
data.value: Print vehicle maintenance records including maintenance type, date, mileage, cost, and service shop details

data.name: Report.EquipmentListDesc
data.value: Print equipment basic data list including equipment code, name, category, brand, model, location, responsible employee, and next maintenance date

data.name: Report.EquipmentMaintenanceRecordDesc
data.value: Print equipment maintenance records including maintenance type, date, cost, service provider, and performed by employee details

data.name: Report.EmployeeRosterDesc
data.value: Print employee basic data list including employee code, name, department, position, hire date, and employment status

data.name: Report.EmployeeDetailDesc
data.value: Print complete employee details including contact info, emergency contacts, and employment information, one block per employee

data.name: Report.ScaleRecordDesc
data.value: Print scale record list grouped by scale type, including plate number, customer, warehouse, weight, and cost details

data.name: Report.AccountsReceivableSetoffDesc
data.value: Print accounts receivable setoff document including customer info, offset details, and payment records

data.name: Report.AccountsPayableSetoffDesc
data.value: Print accounts payable setoff document including supplier info, offset details, and payment records

data.name: Report.AccountItemListDesc
data.value: Print standard chart of accounts grouped by account type, showing account code, name, level, and debit/credit direction

data.name: Report.TrialBalanceDesc
data.value: Summarize debit/credit amounts and cumulative ending balances for each account from posted journal entries, verifying balance

data.name: Report.IncomeStatementDesc
data.value: Summarize operating revenue, cost, and expenses for a specified period, calculating gross profit, operating income, and pre-tax income

data.name: Report.BalanceSheetDesc
data.value: Summarize cumulative balances of assets, liabilities, and equity as of a cutoff date (Assets = Liabilities + Equity)

data.name: Report.GeneralLedgerDesc
data.value: Display account cards for all accounts grouped by account type, each showing all posted journal entry details with opening balance, running balance, and closing balance

data.name: Report.SubsidiaryLedgerDesc
data.value: Query specific account cards by account code/name keyword, showing posted journal entry details and running balance, suitable for accounts receivable/payable by customer/supplier

data.name: Report.DetailAccountBalanceDesc
data.value: Summarize opening balance, period debit/credit amounts, and closing balance for each account without transaction details, for quick review of balance changes

data.name: Report.ARAgingAnalysisDesc
data.value: Calculate due dates from delivery date + customer payment days, then summarize outstanding amounts by aging bucket (current / 1-30 / 31-60 / 61-90 / 91-120 / 121+ days overdue), grouped by customer

data.name: Report.APAgingAnalysisDesc
data.value: Calculate due dates from receipt date + supplier payment days, then summarize outstanding amounts by aging bucket (current / 1-30 / 31-60 / 61-90 / 91-120 / 121+ days overdue), grouped by supplier

data.name: Report.CashFlowDesc
data.value: Prepare a cash flow statement using the indirect method per IAS 7, starting from net income and adjusting for non-cash items, working capital changes, investing and financing activities

data.name: Auth.ErrorLocked
data.value: Account is locked. Please contact your administrator.

data.name: Auth.ErrorDefault
data.value: Login failed. Please try again later.

data.name: Auth.NoPermission
data.value: You do not have permission to access this page

data.name: Auth.NoPermissionDetail
data.value: Sorry, your account does not have sufficient permissions to access this feature.

data.name: Auth.ContactAdmin
data.value: Please contact the system administrator to obtain the required permissions.

data.name: Auth.LoggingOutMessage
data.value: Securely logging you out, please wait...

data.name: Auth.LoggingOutRedirectPrefix
data.value: If the page does not redirect automatically, please

data.name: Error.PageHasError
data.value: The page has encountered an error

data.name: Error.ContactEngineer
data.value: Please contact an engineer to fix the issue. We apologize for the inconvenience.

data.name: Error.UnknownError
data.value: An unknown system error has occurred

data.name: Error.ReportThankYou
data.value: Thank you for your report. We will address this issue as soon as possible.

data.name: Error.MsgTimeout
data.value: System response timed out. Please try again later.

data.name: Error.MsgConnection
data.value: Database connection error. Please try again later.

data.name: Error.MsgUnauthorized
data.value: Insufficient permissions. Please contact your administrator.

data.name: Error.MsgValidation
data.value: Data validation failed. Please check your input.

data.name: Error.MsgFile
data.value: Related file not found. Please contact technical support.

data.name: Error.MsgMemory
data.value: Insufficient system resources. Please contact technical support.

data.name: Error.MsgDatabase
data.value: Database operation error. Please try again later.

data.name: Error.MsgGeneral
data.value: A system error has occurred. Please contact technical support.

data.name: About.LineScanQr
data.value: Scan QR Code to Add as Friend

data.name: About.LineContact
data.value: Use Line App to scan this QR Code to contact us

data.name: About.QrCodePlaceholder
data.value: Please place QR Code image here

data.name: Home.RestoreDefaultTooltip
data.value: Restore home to system default configuration

data.name: Home.ConfirmRestoreMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to restore the home page to default? All custom panels will be cleared and default panels will be recreated.

data.name: Home.DeletePanelMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the "{0}" panel? All items in the panel will also be deleted.

data.name: Home.CompanySetupMessage
data.value: Company information has not been set up. Would you like to set it up now?

data.name: Home.NoPanelItemsHint
data.value: Click the edit button to customize this panel

data.name: Home.NoPanelsHint
data.value: Create your first panel to start customizing your workspace

data.name: Message.CompanySetupFailed
data.value: Error occurred while setting up company

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Description
data.value: Sales Orders record items, quantities, and amounts ordered by customers. After creation, orders can be approved, printed as delivery notes, and converted to deliveries or returns.

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Step1
data.value: Select Customer: Search and select the ordering customer

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Step2
data.value: Fill in Order Info: Set the order date, tax method, and other basic details

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Step3
data.value: Add Order Items: Add items with quantities and unit prices in the details tab

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Step4
data.value: Verify Amounts: Check that totals and tax amounts are correct

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Step5
data.value: Save or Submit: Click save, or submit for approval

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.Customer
data.value: Select the customer for this order; related data will auto-populate

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.OrderDate
data.value: Order creation date, defaults to today, can be changed manually

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.TaxMethod
data.value: Select tax calculation method (tax-inclusive, tax-exclusive, zero-rated), affects item amount calculation

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Tip1
data.value: You can import from a quotation to auto-fill order details, saving time on repeated data entry.

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Warning1
data.value: Once approved, order content cannot be modified. Please verify all data before submitting for approval.

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Detail1
data.value: Click "Add" to insert items — each row contains item name, quantity, and unit price

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Detail2
data.value: The item name field supports smart search — type keywords to quickly find items

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Detail3
data.value: After entering quantity and unit price, subtotals are calculated automatically

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Detail4
data.value: Drag to reorder items, or click the delete button to remove an item

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Approval1
data.value: Orders can be submitted for approval after creation; delivery can proceed only after approval

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Approval2
data.value: Approved orders can be printed as delivery notes or converted to delivery records

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Approval3
data.value: To modify an approved order, it must first be rejected (requires rejection permission)

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq1Q
data.value: How to import from a quotation?

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq1A
data.value: Click "Import from Quotation" in the action buttons, select a quotation, and items will auto-fill.

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq2A
data.value: Make sure a customer is selected, at least one item exists, and all required fields are filled.

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq3Q
data.value: How to use the draft feature?

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq3A
data.value: Click "Save as Draft" to save an incomplete order. Drafts won't enter the approval flow and can be edited anytime.

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Warning2
data.value: Changing the tax method will recalculate all item amounts — please verify after changes.

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Warning3
data.value: Items with existing delivery records cannot be deleted — handle related deliveries first.

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.TabOverview
data.value: This page has three tabs: "Order Data" for basic info and line items; "Customer Info" to view the selected customer's details; "Photos" to upload order-related images.

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Step6
data.value: Follow-up: After approval, the order can be converted to a delivery note or scheduled for production

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.Code
data.value: Auto-generated by the system in the format SO + date + sequence number; cannot be manually edited

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.Company
data.value: Select the company this order belongs to; required in multi-company environments

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.Salesperson
data.value: The salesperson responsible for this order; affects sales performance tracking

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.FormCreator
data.value: The person who created this order; can be different from the salesperson

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.ExpectedDeliveryDate
data.value: The customer's requested delivery date; referenced during scheduling and delivery

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.PaymentTerms
data.value: Agreed payment method and terms, e.g., "Net 30 days", "Cash on delivery"

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.DeliveryTerms
data.value: Delivery method and location, e.g., "Ship to customer warehouse", "Customer pickup"

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.Remarks
data.value: Additional notes or special requirements; will appear on printed documents

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.TotalAmount
data.value: Sum of all line item subtotals (before tax); auto-calculated by the system

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.DiscountAmount
data.value: Total discount from all line items; auto-calculated from each item's discount percentage

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.SalesTaxAmount
data.value: Tax calculated based on tax type and rate; in tax-inclusive mode, back-calculated from the total

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Field.TotalAmountWithTax
data.value: Final receivable amount = Total + Tax; this is the actual amount the customer pays

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Detail5
data.value: Each line item can have a discount percentage; the system auto-calculates the discounted subtotal

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Detail6
data.value: Items with delivery records will show delivered and pending quantities, and cannot be deleted

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Action.Convert
data.value: Convert the approved order into a delivery note; the system auto-populates undelivered items and quantities

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Action.Schedule
data.value: View production schedule for order items; plan production schedules (available after approval only)

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Action.Inventory
data.value: Check real-time inventory for all order items; the button turns yellow when stock is insufficient

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Action.Print
data.value: Preview and print the sales order; supports PDF and Excel export

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Action.Draft
data.value: Save the order as a draft; drafts do not enter the approval workflow and can be edited anytime

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Approval4
data.value: The system can be configured for auto-approval or manual approval by the administrator in system settings

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Tip2
data.value: All amount fields are auto-calculated — no manual input needed. They update instantly when details change.

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Tip3
data.value: The "Customer Info" tab lets you view the selected customer's contact details without leaving this page.

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq4Q
data.value: Why are some fields not editable?

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq4A
data.value: When the order already has line items, basic fields like customer, company, and dates are locked to prevent inconsistencies with the details.

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq5Q
data.value: How do I check delivery progress?

data.name: Guide.SalesOrder.Faq5A
data.value: Each line item shows "Delivered Qty" and "Pending Qty". You can also use the "Check Inventory" button for an overview of all items.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Description
data.value: Quotations provide item pricing to customers. Once confirmed, they can be converted into sales orders.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.TabOverview
data.value: Three tabs: Quotation Data, Customer Info, Photos.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Step2
data.value: Fill basic info: date, tax type, project name

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Step3
data.value: Add line items with quantities and prices

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Field.Customer
data.value: Select the customer for this quotation

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Field.Subtotal
data.value: Sum of items before discount; auto-calculated

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Action.Convert
data.value: Convert to sales order; auto-populates unconverted items

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Action.Print
data.value: Preview and print; supports PDF and Excel

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Action.Draft
data.value: Save as draft; won't enter approval

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Tip1
data.value: Can convert multiple times; each brings remaining quantities.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Tip2
data.value: Set project name to search related quotations by project.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Warning1
data.value: Fields locked after approval or conversion.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Warning2
data.value: Deleting converted items may affect related orders.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Faq1Q
data.value: Can convert to orders multiple times?

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Faq1A
data.value: Yes, each time brings unconverted remaining quantities.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Faq2A
data.value: Ensure saved, approved, and has unconverted items.

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Faq3Q
data.value: How to edit an approved quotation?

data.name: Guide.Quotation.Faq3A
data.value: An authorized user must reject it first.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Description
data.value: Delivery notes record items delivered to customers. Usually from sales orders.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.TabOverview
data.value: Two tabs: Delivery Data and Customer Info.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Tip1
data.value: Details show source order info for tracking.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Tip2
data.value: Use filters to import from specific orders.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Warning1
data.value: Items with returns cannot be deleted.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Faq1Q
data.value: Can include items from multiple orders?

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Faq1A
data.value: Yes, use filters to select different orders.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Faq2Q
data.value: Why can't I delete some items?

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Faq2A
data.value: Items with return/setoff records cannot be deleted.

data.name: Guide.SalesDelivery.Faq3A
data.value: Click Convert to Return; system auto-populates returnable items.

data.name: Guide.SalesReturn.Description
data.value: Sales returns record items returned by customers. Can create setoffs for refunds.

data.name: Guide.SalesReturn.TabOverview
data.value: Two tabs: Return Data and Customer Info.

data.name: Guide.SalesReturn.Step4
data.value: Enter return quantities and verify amounts

data.name: Guide.SalesReturn.Warning1
data.value: Items with setoff records cannot be modified.

data.name: Guide.SalesReturn.Warning2
data.value: Return qty cannot exceed delivered minus returned.

data.name: Guide.SalesReturn.Faq1A
data.value: Cannot exceed delivered minus already returned.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Description
data.value: Purchase orders record procurement requests to suppliers. Convert to receiving after approval.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.TabOverview
data.value: Two tabs: PO Data and Supplier Info.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Action.Convert
data.value: Convert to receiving; auto-populates unreceived items

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Action.CopyMsg
data.value: Format order as text for messaging to supplier

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Tip1
data.value: Copy Message supports custom templates via gear icon.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Tip2
data.value: Expected date defaults to 7 days after order date.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Warning2
data.value: Items with receiving records cannot be deleted.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Faq1Q
data.value: How to quickly order from supplier?

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Faq1A
data.value: Use Copy Message to send via messaging app.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Faq2A
data.value: Yes, each conversion brings unreceived quantities.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseOrder.Faq3A
data.value: Fields lock when approved or has receiving records.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Description
data.value: Receiving notes record items received from suppliers. Can specify warehouses and batch numbers.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.TabOverview
data.value: Two tabs: Receiving Data and Supplier Info.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Step3
data.value: Use Smart Load to import items

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Step5
data.value: Save and approve; items stocked on approval

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Detail1
data.value: Smart Load imports unreceived PO items

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Detail2
data.value: Verify actual received qty per item

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Detail3
data.value: Assign warehouses; use Unify Warehouse for batch setting

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Tip1
data.value: Unify Warehouse sets all items to same warehouse.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Tip2
data.value: Received qty can differ from ordered; system tracks difference.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Warning1
data.value: Items with returns/setoffs cannot be deleted.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Faq1A
data.value: Yes, remaining can be imported next time.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReceiving.Faq2A
data.value: Manually add items; not required from PO.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReturn.Description
data.value: Purchase returns record items returned to suppliers. Can create setoffs for deductions.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReturn.TabOverview
data.value: Two tabs: Return Data and Supplier Info.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReturn.Step4
data.value: Enter return quantities and verify amounts

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReturn.Warning1
data.value: Items with setoff records cannot be modified.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReturn.Warning2
data.value: Return qty cannot exceed received minus returned.

data.name: Guide.PurchaseReturn.Faq1A
data.value: Cannot exceed received minus already returned.

data.name: BatchDelete.Warning
data.value: Warning: This operation cannot be undone!

data.name: Shortcut.InfoMessage
data.value: The following keyboard shortcuts are available in the system. Using shortcuts improves your efficiency.

data.name: Shortcut.TabHelpText
data.value: Click "Change", then press Alt or Ctrl + a letter key to set the shortcut; press Esc to cancel

data.name: Shortcut.ConflictError
data.value: Conflicts with "{0}" shortcut, please choose another combination

data.name: Search.NoResults
data.value: No matching items found. Please try different keywords.

data.name: StickyNote.EmptyMessage
data.value: No notes yet. Click "+" to start

data.name: Chart.ClickForDetail
data.value: Click on chart segment to view details

data.name: Message.DateRangeInvalid
data.value: Start date cannot be later than end date

data.name: Placeholder.LoginAccount
data.value: Enter login account (leave blank to disable login)

data.name: Placeholder.LoginAccountKeepPassword
data.value: Leave blank to keep existing password

data.name: Placeholder.SelectRole
data.value: Select a permission group to configure ...

data.name: Modal.ConfirmDeleteVisitRecord
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this visit record?

data.name: Modal.ConfirmDeleteComplaintRecord
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this complaint record?

data.name: Supplier.AutoSyncNote
data.value: Auto-synced when purchase order is saved. ★ indicates preferred supplier

data.name: Supplier.NoItems
data.value: No supplier products yet. Will be created automatically after saving a purchase order

data.name: Supplier.ConfirmRemoveItem
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove "{0}" from the supplier catalog?

data.name: Supplier.AlreadyBound
data.value: Item "{0}" is already bound to this supplier

data.name: Supplier.ConfirmClearAll
data.value: Are you sure you want to clear all supplier product details?

data.name: Employee.EmptyMeansNoLogin
data.value: Leave blank to prevent this employee from logging in

data.name: Employee.KeepPasswordHint
data.value: Leave blank to keep existing password when editing

data.name: Employee.RoleRequiredHint
data.value: Set this employee's system operation permissions (required when account is set)

data.name: Permission.AdminHasAll
data.value: The admin permission group has all permissions.

data.name: Permission.SelectAllHint
data.value: Select All / Clear All only affects normal permissions. Sensitive permissions require manual individual selection for security.

data.name: Permission.SensitiveDanger
data.value: Please grant with caution! These permissions may affect system security and stability.

data.name: Permission.SelectAllTooltip
data.value: Select normal permissions only; sensitive permissions require manual selection

data.name: Permission.ClearAllTooltip
data.value: Clear normal permissions only; sensitive permissions require manual deselection

data.name: Purchase.NoPendingItems
data.value: All done! No pending items for approval.

data.name: Purchase.SelectItemsFirst
data.value: Please select items to approve first

data.name: Composition.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by formula code, spec, customer or category...

data.name: Composition.CustomModeDesc
data.value: Do not use existing formula; manually select components and set quantities

data.name: Composition.NoBOMInfo
data.value: No BOM formula created for this product. Please select "Custom" mode to build the composition manually.

data.name: Composition.CustomModeSelectDesc
data.value: Select components below; checked items can have quantity and unit edited in the table.

data.name: Composition.EmptyMsgCustom
data.value: Click the "Add Component" button above to select components

data.name: Message.DuplicateComponent
data.value: Duplicate component: {0}. Please fix before closing.

data.name: Inventory.SummaryNote
data.value: ※ Data from database; verify actual stock on-site

data.name: Schedule.MergeSchedulesDesc
data.value: Checked: merge all selected details into one schedule | Unchecked: create separate schedule for each detail

data.name: Schedule.NoSchedulableHint
data.value: (Item must be marked as schedulable and have pending quantity)

data.name: Schedule.HasNoBOMWarning
data.value: {0} selected detail(s) have no BOM composition.

data.name: Schedule.HasShortageWarning
data.value: Some components have insufficient stock. Stock will be deducted (InProductionStock) when production starts and finished goods will be stored upon completion.

data.name: Schedule.SelectAtLeastOne
data.value: Please select at least one detail

data.name: Schedule.NoBOMConfirm
data.value: {0} detail(s) have no BOM composition and will not create component requirements. Continue?

data.name: Message.ConfirmClearAll
data.value: Are you sure you want to clear all details?

data.name: Composition.RemarksTooltip
data.value: Optional. Record remarks for this component (editable even after advancing).

data.name: Item.A4BarcodeHint
data.value: Hint: One A4 sheet can print 24 barcodes

data.name: Journal.NoPendingPurchaseReceiving
data.value: No pending purchase receiving to journalize

data.name: Journal.NoPendingPurchaseReturn
data.value: No pending purchase returns to journalize

data.name: Journal.NoPendingSalesDelivery
data.value: No pending sales deliveries to journalize

data.name: Journal.NoPendingSalesReturn
data.value: No pending sales returns to journalize

data.name: Journal.NoPendingSetoff
data.value: No pending setoff documents to journalize

data.name: Journal.NoPendingMaterialIssue
data.value: No confirmed material issues pending journalization

data.name: Journal.NoCostDataTooltip
data.value: Detail UnitCost not set, journal transfer will fail

data.name: Journal.NoPendingProductionCompletion
data.value: No production completions pending (inventory transaction required)

data.name: Report.ARNoCustomerSelected
data.value: No customer selected; leave empty to print all customers' AR

data.name: Accounting.CreateItemSubAccountTitle
data.value: Create inventory sub-account for this product

data.name: Message.InsufficientStockWarning
data.value: Some components have insufficient stock. Please adjust issue quantities or replenish stock.

data.name: Message.NoBOMComponents
data.value: This schedule item has no BOM components

data.name: Message.NoScheduleItemInfo
data.value: Unable to load schedule item info

data.name: Message.StockInsufficientFor
data.value: Insufficient stock for the following components: {0}

data.name: Message.SelectAtLeastOneItem
data.value: Please select at least one product

data.name: Message.SupplierAlreadyExists
data.value: This supplier already exists, please select another

data.name: Message.NeedAtLeastOneSupplier
data.value: At least one supplier is required

data.name: Message.CompletionExceedsRemaining
data.value: Completion qty cannot exceed remaining qty {0}

data.name: Message.NoWarehouseForInventory
data.value: Cannot determine target warehouse; inventory not updated

data.name: Message.DragOrderToSchedule
data.value: Drag an order from the left, or click the arrow button to add to schedule

data.name: Message.UsedAmountExceedsBalance
data.value: Used amount cannot exceed available balance {0}

data.name: Message.UsedAmountBelowZero
data.value: Used amount cannot be less than 0

data.name: Message.TransferTypeNeedsSource
data.value: Transfer type must have a source prepayment item

data.name: Message.UsedAmountMustBePositive
data.value: Used amount must be greater than 0

data.name: Message.RecordNotSavedCannotQuery
data.value: This record has not been saved; cannot query related documents

data.name: Message.InitARReportFailed
data.value: Failed to initialize AR report data

data.name: Message.LoadBankPaymentMethodFailed
data.value: Failed to load bank and payment method data: {0}

data.name: Company.LogoFormatHint
data.value: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, SVG | Max size: 500KB | Recommended: 200x80px ~ 400x160px

data.name: Paper.NoPaperSettings
data.value: No paper formats configured. Please enter paper dimensions manually.

data.name: Report.AllConfigured
data.value: All reports are configured. Reports with "Disabled" status are under development or discontinued and cannot be configured.

data.name: Message.SetAtLeastOne
data.value: Please set at least one printer or paper

data.name: Message.SelectAtLeastOnePrinterOrPaper
data.value: Please select at least a printer or paper

data.name: Certificate.Desc
data.value: Allows users to download and install the server certificate. After installation, browsers will no longer show HTTPS security warnings.

data.name: Certificate.AlreadyExists
data.value: Certificate already exists. To regenerate (e.g., if the server IP changed), click the button below.

data.name: Certificate.NotExists
data.value: No certificate generated yet. Click the button below to automatically generate and apply one, no manual steps required.

data.name: Certificate.IPHint
data.value: If users connect via an external IP or domain (e.g., public network), enter it here to ensure the certificate covers that address.

data.name: Certificate.InstallerDesc
data.value: Users double-click after download and click "Yes" once to complete installation automatically

data.name: Module.ControlDesc
data.value: Control the feature modules available in this system. Disabled modules will be hidden from all users (except SuperAdmin).

data.name: Vehicle.SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search license plate, vehicle name, brand, type...

data.name: Vehicle.CountAndHint
data.value: {0} vehicles found. Click a row to select.

data.name: Warehouse.NoImportItems
data.value: No importable schedule items (all items are completed)

data.name: Warehouse.ImportHint
data.value: Tip: Importing will increase inventory in the corresponding warehouse/location and mark schedule items as "Completed"

data.name: Label.ViewTransactionHistory
data.value: View transaction history for this product

data.name: Warehouse.NoLowStock
data.value: No low stock products at this time.

data.name: Warehouse.NoOverStock
data.value: No overstocked products at this time.

data.name: Warehouse.LoadingAlerts
data.value: Loading stock details without alert levels...

data.name: Warehouse.AllAlertsSet
data.value: All stock details have alert levels set.

data.name: Message.EnterMinOrMax
data.value: Please enter at least a minimum or maximum level

data.name: Message.MinCannotExceedMax
data.value: Minimum level cannot exceed maximum level

data.name: Warehouse.SaveFirst
data.value: Please save the warehouse first to view location data

data.name: Message.PreviewFailed
data.value: Unable to generate preview image, please check the file format and size

data.name: Message.NoFileSelected
data.value: Please select a file to upload first

data.name: Report.BatchFillTitle
data.value: Batch set printer and paper for all reports

data.name: Report.NeedAtLeastOne
data.value: Please configure at least one printer or paper

data.name: Report.NeedChoicePrinterPaper
data.value: Please select at least a printer or paper

data.name: System.CertDesc
data.value: Allow users to download and install the server certificate. After installation, browsers will no longer show HTTPS security warnings.

data.name: System.CertExistsNote
data.value: Certificate exists. To regenerate (e.g., after server IP change), click the button below.

data.name: System.NoCertNote
data.value: No certificate generated yet. Click the button below to automatically generate and apply one without any manual commands.

data.name: System.ExternalSANHint
data.value: If users connect via an external IP or domain (e.g., external network), enter it here to ensure the certificate covers that address.

data.name: System.GenCertTitle
data.value: Automatically generate self-signed SSL certificate (includes all server IPs), no manual steps required

data.name: System.InstallerDesc
data.value: Users double-click after downloading and click "Yes" once to complete installation automatically

data.name: System.InstallStep1
data.value: Provide the "One-Click Installer" link above to users, or download and send via USB / email

data.name: System.InstallStep4
data.value: After seeing "Certificate installed successfully", close all browsers

data.name: System.InstallStep5
data.value: Reopen the browser to connect normally without security warnings

data.name: System.ModuleControlDesc
data.value: Control the feature modules available in this system. Disabled modules will be hidden from all users (except SuperAdmin).

data.name: Warehouse.ClosedTooltip
data.value: When checked, this item will no longer appear in the import schedule list

data.name: Inventory.ViewHistory
data.value: View transaction history for this product

data.name: Warehouse.NeedSelectItem
data.value: Please select at least one schedule item

data.name: Warehouse.NeedSelectWH
data.value: The following items have no warehouse/location selected: {0}{1}

data.name: Warehouse.QuantityError
data.value: The following items must have quantity greater than 0, or be marked as closed: {0}{1}

data.name: Warehouse.ConfirmClose
data.value:
The following {0} items are marked as "Closed":
{1}{2}

Closed items will not be stocked, and will no longer appear in the import schedule list.
Are you sure you want to continue?

data.name: Warehouse.ImportSuccessMsg
data.value: Successfully imported {0} schedule items to inventory

data.name: Warehouse.NeedMinOrMax
data.value: Please enter at least a minimum or maximum level

data.name: Warehouse.MinExceedsMax
data.value: Minimum level cannot exceed maximum level

data.name: Warehouse.MinExceedsMaxItem
data.value: {0} minimum level cannot exceed maximum level

data.name: Tooltip.SelectSupplierItem
data.value: Select the supplier for this product

data.name: Tooltip.EnterSupplierCode
data.value: Enter the supplier's product code or part number

data.name: Tooltip.EnterSupplierPrice
data.value: Enter the supplier's quoted price for this product

data.name: Tooltip.EnterLeadTime
data.value: Enter the supplier's lead time in days

data.name: Tooltip.EnterMinOrderQty
data.value: Enter the supplier's minimum order quantity

data.name: Tooltip.SelectUnitForSupplier
data.value: Select the unit of measure for this supplier's product

data.name: Filter.CustomTypeNote
data.value: Custom filter type must be implemented in the parent component

data.name: Message.SelectSupplierFirst
data.value: Select a supplier to view their pending purchase items

data.name: Tooltip.PurchaseItemSearch
data.value: Search and select a product (enter code or name). Items with receiving records cannot be changed

data.name: Message.ItemHasReceiving
data.value: This product has receiving records and cannot be changed

data.name: Tooltip.PurchaseQuantity
data.value: Purchase quantity. Items with receiving records cannot be modified

data.name: Message.QuantityHasReceiving
data.value: This product has receiving records and the quantity cannot be modified

data.name: Tooltip.ReceivingCompleted
data.value: Mark whether receiving is complete for this product (can be marked early manually)

data.name: Tooltip.PurchaseRemarks
data.value: Optional. Record remarks for this purchase item (editable after approval)

data.name: Message.FullyReceivedCannotUndo
data.value: This product is fully received and the completion status cannot be undone

data.name: Message.NeedAtLeastOneItem
data.value: At least one product is required

data.name: Message.AlreadyHasDetails
data.value: There are already detail items; Smart Order cannot be used

data.name: Message.NoHistoryPurchase
data.value: This supplier has no purchase history

data.name: Message.LoadLastPurchaseDetailsTooltip
data.value: Load the last purchase details for this supplier

data.name: Message.PleaseSelectSupplierForSmartOrder
data.value: Please select a supplier before using Smart Order

data.name: Message.SupplierNoHistoryPurchase
data.value: This supplier has no purchase history; Smart Order cannot be used

data.name: Message.SmartOrderConfirm
data.value: Smart Order Confirm: This will clear existing details and load {0} items from the last purchase.

data.name: Message.SmartOrderSuccess
data.value: Successfully loaded {0} items from the last purchase

data.name: Message.LoadLastPurchaseFailed
data.value: Failed to load last purchase details: {0}

data.name: Message.NoDetailsToDelete
data.value: There are no details to clear

data.name: Message.AllDetailsLocked
data.value: All details are locked (have receiving records) and cannot be cleared

data.name: Message.ItemNotSaved
data.value: This item has not been saved yet; related documents cannot be viewed

data.name: Message.HasUndeletableDetailsTooltip
data.value: Some products have receiving records and cannot be cleared

data.name: Tooltip.SubtotalTaxInclusive
data.value: Tax Inclusive: Qty × Price (price includes tax)

data.name: YearEnd.AlreadyClosed
data.value: Year {0} has already been closed and cannot be closed again.

data.name: YearEnd.ConfirmWarning
data.value: Executing will lock all periods of year {0}. No journal entries can be modified after this. Please confirm all entries have been reviewed before clicking "Confirm & Execute Closing".

data.name: YearEnd.InProgress
data.value: Year {0} closing in progress, please wait⋯

data.name: YearEnd.InProgressNote
data.value: Generating closing entries and locking periods. Do not close this window.

data.name: YearEnd.SuccessNote
data.value: Closing entries generated, periods locked, and year {0} periods initialized.

data.name: Page.AccountItemSubtitle
data.value: Manage the standard Chart of Accounts

data.name: Page.JournalEntrySubtitle
data.value: Manage journal entries and transaction lines

data.name: Page.FiscalPeriodSubtitle
data.value: Manage fiscal period settings to control which periods allow journal entry creation

data.name: Page.OpeningBalanceSubtitle
data.value: Enter opening balances for each account — only required once per fiscal year

data.name: Page.CustomerSubtitle
data.value: Manage all customer data and contact information

data.name: Page.CustomerVisitSubtitle
data.value: Manage customer visit and contact records

data.name: Page.CustomerComplaintSubtitle
data.value: Record and track customer complaint events and handling status

data.name: Page.DocumentCategorySubtitle
data.value: Manage document categories and source settings

data.name: Page.DocumentSubtitle
data.value: Manage and access all stored documents

data.name: Page.DepartmentSubtitle
data.value: Set up company organizational structure and department info

data.name: Page.EmployeeSubtitle
data.value: Manage employee data and permission settings

data.name: Page.EmployeePositionSubtitle
data.value: Manage all position data and hierarchy levels

data.name: Page.RoleSubtitle
data.value: Manage system roles and permission settings

data.name: Page.BankSubtitle
data.value: Manage bank information and contact details

data.name: Page.CurrencySubtitle
data.value: Manage supported currencies and exchange rate settings

data.name: Page.PaymentMethodSubtitle
data.value: Manage all payment method data and settings

data.name: Page.CompositionCategorySubtitle
data.value: Set up bill of materials type categories

data.name: Page.MaterialSubtitle
data.value: Manage all material data and attribute settings

data.name: Page.ItemCategorySubtitle
data.value: Manage all product category data and hierarchy

data.name: Page.ItemSubtitle
data.value: Manage all item data and inventory information

data.name: Page.ProductionScheduleSubtitle
data.value: Manage production schedule plans and execution

data.name: Page.UnitSubtitle
data.value: Manage all measurement unit data and conversions

data.name: Page.PurchaseReceivingSubtitle
data.value: Manage all receiving orders and receiving status

data.name: Page.PurchaseReturnSubtitle
data.value: Manage all purchase return orders and refund status

data.name: Page.QuotationSubtitle
data.value: Manage all quotation data and detail information

data.name: Page.SalesDeliverySubtitle
data.value: Manage all sales delivery data and detail information

data.name: Page.SalesOrderSubtitle
data.value: Manage all order data and detail information

data.name: Page.SalesReturnSubtitle
data.value: Manage all return order data and return status

data.name: Page.SupplierSubtitle
data.value: Manage all supplier data and contact information

data.name: Page.CompanySubtitle
data.value: Manage company basic information and settings

data.name: Page.ErrorLogSubtitle
data.value: Query and monitor system error records

data.name: Page.PaperSettingSubtitle
data.value: Manage paper specifications and print settings

data.name: Page.PrinterConfigurationSubtitle
data.value: Manage printer connection settings in the system

data.name: Page.ReportPrintConfigurationSubtitle
data.value: Manage print settings for different reports (reports are auto-created; only printer and paper settings can be edited)

data.name: Page.VehicleSubtitle
data.value: Manage company and customer vehicle data

data.name: Page.VehicleMaintenanceSubtitle
data.value: Manage vehicle maintenance and repair records

data.name: Page.EquipmentMaintenanceSubtitle
data.value: Manage equipment maintenance and repair records

data.name: Page.InventoryStockSubtitle
data.value: Manage product inventory and warehouse locations

data.name: Page.InventoryTransactionSubtitle
data.value: Query and manage all inventory transaction history

data.name: Page.MaterialIssueSubtitle
data.value: Manage material issue orders and records

data.name: Page.StockTakingSubtitle
data.value: Manage stock taking orders and records

data.name: Page.WarehouseSubtitle
data.value: Manage all warehouse data and basic information

data.name: Page.WarehouseLocationSubtitle
data.value: Manage all warehouse location data and basic information

data.name: ApprovalSettings.Description
data.value: In manual approval mode, documents require human confirmation. In auto mode, the system automatically approves on save.

data.name: ApprovalSettings.HideApprovalInfoSectionDesc
data.value: When checked, approval status, approver, and approval time fields will not be shown on document edit pages

data.name: SubAccount.BatchCreateDesc
data.value: Create sub-accounts for existing customers, suppliers, and products (skips those that already have sub-accounts). Confirm control account codes above are correct and saved before proceeding.

data.name: SubAccount.CreateCustomerTitle
data.value: Create sub-accounts for all existing customers

data.name: SubAccount.CreateSupplierTitle
data.value: Create sub-accounts for all existing suppliers

data.name: SubAccount.CreateItemTitle
data.value: Create sub-accounts for all existing items

data.name: SubAccount.CreateResultWithErrors
data.value: {0} sub-account creation complete: created {1}, skipped {2}, errors {3} ({4}{5})

data.name: SubAccount.CreateError
data.value: Error during batch creation of {0} sub-accounts: {1}

data.name: SystemParam.ResetTitle
data.value: Reset all parameters to factory defaults

data.name: SystemParam.ResetConfirmMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to reset system parameters to their default configuration? All custom settings will be cleared.

data.name: Document.SupportedFormats
data.value: Supported formats: PDF, Word, Excel, Images (max 20MB)

data.name: Message.AtLeastOneFile
data.value: At least one attachment is required

data.name: Message.EntityNoResults
data.value: No {0} data found matching the criteria

data.name: Message.EntityDeleteConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete {0} "{1}"?

data.name: Inventory.AtLeastOneDetail
data.value: At least one inventory detail is required

data.name: Inventory.DuplicateWarehouseLocation
data.value: Duplicate warehouse and location combination exists, please review

data.name: Inventory.ReservedExceedsCurrent
data.value: Reserved stock cannot exceed current stock

data.name: Inventory.CurrentStockReadonlyHint
data.value: Current stock must be modified through stock adjustment, receiving, or shipping processes

data.name: Inventory.NoWarehouseMessage
data.value: No warehouses have been set up yet. A warehouse is required to add inventory details. Would you like to create one now?

data.name: Inventory.WarehouseCreatedContinue
data.value: Warehouse created. You can now add inventory details.

data.name: Message.ConfirmDeleteExistingDetail
data.value: This detail is saved in the database. Are you sure you want to delete it?

data.name: Message.DraftSuccess
data.value: {0} draft saved. Please remember to complete all required fields.

data.name: Message.DraftWarning
data.value: This record is a draft. Please complete all required fields.

data.name: Modal.SaveAsDraftMessage
data.value: The following required fields or conditions are not met. Would you like to save as a draft instead? Drafts will not appear in official reports.

data.name: Message.ConfirmBatchDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {0} {1}(s)?

data.name: SalesTarget.BatchEmptyHint
data.value: Select a year and click Load

data.name: SalesTarget.BatchFooterHint
data.value: Year {0}: Set amount to 0 to delete the target

data.name: SalesTarget.YearSwitchConfirm
data.value: Year {0} has unsaved changes. Save before switching?

data.name: SalesTarget.CloseConfirm
data.value: Year {0} has unsaved changes. Save before closing?

data.name: Page.SalesTargetSubtitle
data.value: Set and track salesperson sales targets

data.name: Message.NoPagePermission
data.value: You do not have permission to access this page.

data.name: Label.ShowDetailAccountsHint
data.value: Only detail accounts are shown. Rows with amount 0 will not be saved.

data.name: Button.GoToJournalEntry
data.value: Go to Journal Entries to Create Adjusting Entry

data.name: Message.OpeningBalancePosted
data.value: This opening balance entry has been posted (ID: {0})

data.name: Message.PostedEntryReadOnly
data.value: Posted entries cannot be modified directly to maintain audit trails.

data.name: Message.CreateAdjustingEntry
data.value: If you find an error, please create an Adjusting Entry to correct the difference.

data.name: Message.OpeningBalanceDraftExists
data.value: An opening balance draft already exists (ID: {0}). Saving will update the existing record.

data.name: Message.OpeningBalanceSavedAndPosted
data.value: Opening balance has been saved and posted

data.name: Message.OpeningBalanceDraftSaved
data.value: Opening balance draft has been saved

data.name: Report.ManufacturingOrderDesc
data.value: Print manufacturing orders with material details and completion records

data.name: Page.BankStatementSubtitle
data.value: Manage bank statements and journal entry matching

data.name: Report.BankReconciliationDesc
data.value: Query bank statements by period, display matched and unmatched lines to reconcile book balance with bank statement balance
